nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord, the God of Israel, ‘Write all the words which I have spoken to you in a book.

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord, the God of Israel: Write in a book all the words that I have spoken to you.

cnv.text: “耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：‘你要把我對你說過的一切話都寫在書上。

ccb.text: “以下是以色列的上帝耶和华的话，你要把我对你说的话写在书卷上。
